text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while training with Super Creek as usual...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff. Phew...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: The new training plan is great! It's much easier on my legs too.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you did such a good job! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Creek continues to show improvement. She's hitting her daily targets
without a hitch.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: So next on the list is a light sprint on the dirt track, right?

text_block_list.name: First-rate Trainer
text_block_list.text:
How do you ever expect Super Creek to debut with that laughably
meager training regimen?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We both turn to face the veteran trainer who attempted to scout
Creek at the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: First-rate Trainer
text_block_list.text:
If only you had chosen me, then you would've debuted a long time
ago.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hmm... But I think that my trainer's plans are very well made.

text_block_list.name: First-rate Trainer
text_block_list.text: You vastly overestimate the ability of this rookie. ...I should show you what a real trainer can do.
choice_data_list: And what do you mean by that?

text_block_list.name: First-rate Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I suggest that we hold a scrimmage between our racers to show which
of us is more capable of developing talent.

text_block_list.name: First-rate Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I presume you'll accept the challenge... That is if you truly believe
you're the best fit for Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, what should we do...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that I'm just a new trainer, but I know that I'm more
determined than anyone else to support Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If anyone's going to help her reach the top, it's going to be me!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: First-rate Trainer
text_block_list.text:
It's only natural that trainers are proud of our trainees, and are willing
to do whatever it takes to help them reach their full potential.

text_block_list.name: First-rate Trainer
text_block_list.text:
We believe that they deserve to work only with the best. Which
means that if I win, you'll hand over Super Creek to me, correct?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wait, I might lose her?! If that's part of the deal, then I can't accep—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Of course, that's fine with me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Is she serious?! How could she just accept those conditions?

text_block_list.name: First-rate Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I didn't think you'd be the one to agree. Perhaps you admit that
joining me is the best option.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: No, you must be mistaken. I don't plan on losing at all, not one bit.

text_block_list.name: First-rate Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Heh, it doesn't matter though—you'll be transferring to my team soon
enough.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, the veteran trainer takes his leave.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Well, we better train hard then!
choice_data_list: Why did you agree to that?!
Why did you agree to that?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, you accepted his challenge because you believe that you're the
right trainer for me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It made me so happy to hear that you want to help me become my
best. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's why there's nothing to worry about at all. I'll make sure that
everything's going to be all right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's always taking my feelings into consideration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So in order to show my appreciation, there's only one thing left to
do—I gotta prove that I'm the only trainer for her!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Basically, ya guys want me to help out with the trainin' and stuff?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's right. It was my trainer's idea. We agree that it would be
good to practice with the same conditions as the scrimmage.
choice_data_list:
She chose to put her trust in me. Now it's my
turn to prove myself.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Nah, I think she's just tryin' to spoil you again.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But whatever, it's all good. Besides, any sleazeball trainer who uses his own trainee in a bet and tries to steal my girl like that needs to be taught a painful lesson, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Tamtam! You're such a good girl.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Ya tryin' to pat my head again?! Get ya hands away from me! I'm
not a kid anymore!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ah! Come back, Tamtam!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, our preparations for the match against the veteran trainer and
his racer begin.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Good work today, Trainer. Looks like tomorrow's the day of the race.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, don't worry... We'll be just fine. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Do you remember what Tamtam said? That I like to spoil people?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But the truth is... I just want to make others smile, whether it's the kids
at the day care or you...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I perform my best when I'm taking care of those around me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
So it doesn't matter if you're a rookie—I believe in your skills, and you
can count on me to prove it to everyone.
